content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: Winter is Over
description: A unique Eridian relic that boosts incendiary damage. It is a focused offensive option for fire-heavy builds, and its effect is strong enough to matter on characters or loadouts built around burning targets down quickly.
notes:
It drops from Ghost, a named skag in a small cave near the entrance to The Burrows.

This relic can appear in blue or purple rarity. Its name nods to the phrase "Winter is Coming."
